text: 4903 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: "إِذَا قَامَتِ اَلْمَرْأَةُ عَنْ مَجْلِسِهَا فَلاَ يَجْلِسُ أَحَدٌ فِي ذَلِكَ اَلْمَجْلِسِ حَتَّى يَبْرُدَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4903 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"When a woman leaves her seat, no one should sit in that place until it has cooled down."
